description.ko: 첨단 기술과 도시의 쇠락이 합성 조명의 영원한 빛 아래 공존하는 수직 도시의 생생한 묘사입니다.
description.en: A vivid depiction of a vertical city where advanced technology and urban decay coexist under the eternal glow of synthetic lights.

prompt: A sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at midnight, rain-slicked streets reflecting vibrant holographic advertisements in electric blue and hot pink, dense architectural layers with flying vehicles weaving through skyscraper canyons, cinematic volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, high-tech low-life aesthetic, sharp focus, atmospheric fog.
